expectations.evidence: Creates custom 8-part structure (Hidden Mental Models, First 90 Days, Engineer-to-PM Gaps, Real PM Toolkit, Political Survival, Failure Modes, Learning Plan, Unknown Unknowns). Does not use standardized template.
Covers PM topics broadly across 8 sections, mentions PRDs, sprint planning, user research, prioritization, OKRs, stakeholder management.
Explicitly addresses engineer-to-PM transition, includes 4-week accelerated plan, acknowledges the 'one month' urgency.
N/A — baseline does not use the template.
